nodes.name: Set Thresholds
nodes.notes: Tune the proactive-flag thresholds here — no code changes needed. See docs/budget-advisor-thresholds.md for what these mean.

parameters.query: SELECT b.week_number, b.weekly_budget, b.weekend_budget, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(amount) FROM transactions WHERE date >= date_trunc('week', CURRENT_DATE)::date AND date <= CURRENT_DATE AND EXTRACT(DOW FROM date) NOT IN (0,6)), 0) AS weekday_spent, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(amount) FROM transactions WHERE date >= date_trunc('week', CURRENT_DATE)::date AND date <= CURRENT_DATE AND EXTRACT(DOW FROM date) IN (0,6)), 0) AS weekend_spent, EXTRACT(ISODOW FROM CURRENT_DATE) AS iso_day_of_week FROM budgets b WHERE b.month = date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE)::date AND b.week_number = CEIL(EXTRACT(DAY FROM CURRENT_DATE) / 7.0) LIMIT 1

SELECT c.id, c.name, c.type, c.budget_amount, c.period, COALESCE(SUM(t.amount) FILTER (WHERE t.date >= CASE WHEN c.period = 'weekly' THEN date_trunc('week', CURRENT_DATE)::date ELSE date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE)::date END AND t.date <= CURRENT_DATE), 0) AS period_spent FROM categories c LEFT JOIN transactions t ON t.category_id = c.id WHERE c.active = true AND c.type = 'recurring_variable' AND c.budget_amount IS NOT NULL AND c.period IS NOT NULL GROUP BY c.id, c.name, c.type, c.budget_amount, c.period
